summary: Trading web app with daily market updates and AI assistant featuring three modes: Daily Strategist (morning briefings, technical alerts), Risk & Portfolio Guard (portfolio health, drawdown protection), and Alpha Hunter (breakout scanning, options activity). Includes market dashboard, watchlist, portfolio overview, and risk-managed trade suggestions.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dark trading terminal logo mark with a stylized upward candlestick chart and circuit-line details in electric green on a near-black background (tradeiq-logo.dim_128x128.png)
- Wide dark trading terminal dashboard hero banner featuring candlestick charts, glowing green trend lines, and subtle grid overlay on a deep charcoal background (dashboard-hero.dim_1200x300.png)

existing_features.title: Build a Market Dashboard page that displays a daily morning briefing summarizing overnight moves across major markets (S&P 500, Crypto, Nasdaq-100), along with a macro events calendar panel showing upcoming events (CPI, earnings reports) and their deviation status.

Build a Watchlist page that displays tracked assets with simulated price data, technical indicators (RSI values), and visual alerts when an asset hits a technical trigger (e.g., RSI > 70 on a 4H timeframe). Include a sentiment badge per asset reflecting positive/neutral/negative news sentiment.

Build a Portfolio Overview page that shows all active positions with their entry price, current simulated price, P&L, total portfolio delta, and a color-coded 'Health Score' (0–100). Highlight positions nearing their stop-loss with a warning indicator. Display a drawdown alert banner if any sector shows a simulated ≥10% drawdown with three suggested Exit or Hedge scenarios.

Build an AI Trading Assistant panel accessible from all pages as a sidebar or dedicated page. The assistant operates in three selectable modes: (1) Daily Strategist — answers questions with morning briefing context and provides risk-managed trade setups with Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit levels; (2) Risk & Portfolio Guard — analyzes proposed trades against existing portfolio for correlation risk and portfolio impact; (3) Alpha Hunter — presents the top 3 daily high-probability breakout setups (Bull Flag, Double Bottom) with Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit levels. The assistant uses pre-scripted intelligent responses based on simulated market data (no external LLM API calls). Users type queries and receive formatted responses.

Apply a dark-themed, professional financial terminal visual design across the entire app. Use a deep charcoal/near-black background with high-contrast accent colors (e.g., electric green for gains, crimson for losses, amber for warnings). Use a monospaced or semi-monospaced typeface for numeric data and a clean sans-serif for prose. Layout should use a persistent left-side navigation bar and card-based content panels with subtle grid lines evoking a trading terminal aesthetic.
Generate a dark trading terminal-style app logo/icon and a dashboard hero banner image.

new_feature_requests.summary: Market dashboard with daily briefings and overnight move summaries
Watchlist with price tracking and technical trigger alerts (RSI, breakouts)
Portfolio overview with health score, delta tracking, and stop-loss monitoring
AI trading assistant with three modes: Daily Strategist, Risk & Portfolio Guard, Alpha Hunter
Sentiment shift monitoring via news and social media correlated with volatility
Risk-managed trade suggestions with Entry, Stop-Loss, and Take-Profit levels

Create a backend actor that stores and manages user watchlist assets, portfolio positions (entry price, quantity, stop-loss, take-profit), and daily market briefing data. Expose CRUD operations for watchlist items and portfolio positions, and a method to store/retrieve the latest daily market briefing content.
